meta.attribution: Stellarium DSO catalogue by the Stellarium project and contributors
meta.modifications: Selected rows carrying Abell/ACO, Barnard, Sh2, vdB, RCW, LDN, or LBN cross-identifiers; normalized names and types; preserved dark-nebula opacity classes without treating them as magnitudes; transformed the catalogue's J2000 positions to ICRS; serialized a separate browser asset.
meta.name: Stellarium DSO cross-index supplement
